
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick all objects that have a printed product label and place them on the floor

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I need to identify objects with printed labels in my visual field. From my current position, I can see some objects on different surfaces. Let me walk around and look more closely to identify which ones have product labels.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.0,
  "y": 1.0,
  "z": -3.0
}
```

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I can see TomatoSoup\_19 and PeanutButter\_8 which clearly have product labels. Let me pick up the tomato soup first.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "TomatoSoup_19"
}
```

<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

```json
  "z": -3
}
```

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have completed the task of collecting and placing all objects with printed labels on the floor. I identified and moved four items:
1. A tomato soup can
2. A peanut butter jar
3. A pills container
4. A painkiller container

All these items have been placed on the floor in an organized manner. I don't see any other objects with printed labels in the environment.
